other_observers: Larry Semo, Tony Leukering, Brian Gibbons, Mymm Ackley on 5/20/2006 and Kara Lewantowicz and Bill Maynard on 5/21/2006.; Larry Semo saw a nightjar during the day of 5/20, that was this bird. Many others including Joey Kellner, Dick Schottler, Norm Erthal, Mark Peterson, Lisa Edwards, Allan Burns, Brad Steger, Nathan Pipelow, and many others heard the bird singing on th
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch, south of the banding station
description: I was with Larry Semo, Tony Leukering, Brian Gibbons, and Mymm Ackley on the evening of May 20th, when a Whip-poor-will started to sing, just after sunset along the road near the banding station at Chico Basin Ranch. The bird gave a typical 'whip-poor-will' 'whip-poor-will' song many times. Early the morning of May 21st, I also heard the bird sing a couple of times with Kara Lewantowicz and Bill Maynard.Behaviors: Singing from Russian olive grove, near the banding station at Chico Basin Ranch, after sunset and before sunrise.Call: 'whip-poor-will' 'whip-poor-will' song heard many timesPlumage: singing
